issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as corrupted PDFs, missing dependencies, or rotated scans.
The installation steps assume a Unix-like environment with apt-get or brew, limiting compatibility with other platforms.

scenarios.name: scan-confidence-report
scenarios.rationale: Baseline runs OCR but skips the text-layer pre-check and offers no per-page confidence; treatment uses pdfplumber pre-check, preprocessing, and image_to_data confidence flagging exactly as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: german-receipt
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses a wrong Tesseract language code and skips preprocessing; treatment installs tesseract-ocr-deu, preprocesses (grayscale/contrast/binarize), and OCRs at 300 DPI with lang='deu' per the skill.
